hero.hero_title: Toilet Tissue, Kitchen Towels, Napkins & Facial Tissue for Global Buyers

home_extras.process_title: Simple and transparent process for each inquiry
home_extras.process_step1_desc: Share product type, ply, size, packing format and monthly demand. We align technical details first.
home_extras.process_step2_desc: Receive a structured quotation with lead time and MOQ. Samples can be arranged for validation.
home_extras.process_step3_desc: After confirmation, we follow production schedule, QC, loading and export documentation delivery.

intro.intro_title: From jumbo parent rolls to finished packs, we supply reliable tissue products for retail, hospitality and foodservice markets.
intro.intro_card1_desc: Strong mill partnerships in China and Vietnam ensure stable quality, price competitiveness and supply continuity.
intro.intro_card2_desc: Every order follows inspection checkpoints for grammage, absorbency, packing and loading quality before shipment.
intro.intro_card3_desc: Experienced export team supports quick quotations, production tracking and reliable booking for different destination markets.

about.about_title: A long-term tissue sourcing and export partner for global distributors and brands
about.about_desc: We focus on household and away-from-home tissue products, offering flexible specifications, private labeling and stable delivery for recurring orders.
about.about_page_title: Yame is a Professional Supplier for Household Products
about.about_page_desc: The Main Products are Parent Roll and Finished Products such as Toilet Paper, Kitchen Paper, Napkin Paper, Paper Towel, Facial Tissue Paper, Pocket Tissue Paper etc.
about.about_page_content: For over 18 years, We are mainly working with china and vietnam mills. We supply all major grades for the away from home and at home markets, including bath, towel, napkin, facial, and specialty grades as Bamboo, Recycled etc that allows us to offer our clients a wide selection of optimal tissue roll solutions.
about.mission_desc: Providing sustainable, high-quality paper solutions that meet the evolving needs of businesses worldwide.
about.vision_desc: To be the leading global supplier of eco-friendly paper products, setting industry standards for quality and sustainability.
about.approach_desc: We combine innovation with traditional craftsmanship to deliver exceptional paper products while minimizing environmental impact.

team.team_title: Expert Team member to get best service

services.services_title: Flexible specifications and packaging solutions for different channels
services.service1_desc: Virgin, recycled or bamboo options with flexible ply, sheet count and embossing patterns for retail and institutional channels.
services.service2_desc: High absorbency rolls and folded formats with customizable core size, pack count and wrapping design.
services.service3_desc: Dinner, cocktail and dispenser formats for restaurants, hotels and catering supply chains.
services.service4_desc: Softness-focused product lines with box and pocket configurations, including private label artwork support.
services.service5_desc: Design adaptation for barcodes, language compliance, carton marks and pallet standards of your target market.
services.service6_desc: From quotation to loading photos and shipment documents, we provide clear communication for each order milestone.
services.services_support_title: Practical services from sourcing to shipment
services.services_support_desc: We support buyers with product matching, specification confirmation, packaging review and export execution so each order can move with fewer surprises.
services.services_commitments_title: The areas we help buyers de-risk
services.services_commitment1_desc: We help confirm ply, sheet size, embossing and pack count before quotation so sampling and production stay aligned.
services.services_commitment2_desc: We review barcode placement, language panels, carton marks and pallet standards before production starts.
services.services_commitment3_desc: Inspection covers absorbency, grammage, count, sealing quality and loading checks before cargo leaves the factory.
services.services_commitment4_desc: We coordinate packing lists, commercial invoices, booking updates and loading photos to keep import planning on track.

project.project_section_title: Built for retail, hospitality and foodservice purchasing requirements
project.specs_desc: Typical commercial ranges for procurement planning. Final specs can be customized.
project.inquiry_box_title: Need custom specs, private label or market-specific packaging?
project.inquiry_box_desc: Send your target market, monthly demand and product details. We will reply with a practical quotation plan.

contact.contact_mailto_tip: After submitting, your email app will open with a prefilled inquiry message.
contact.contact_desc: Don't Hesitate to contact with us for any kind of information

cta.cta_title: Tell us your target market, specs and quantity, and get a practical offer quickly.
cta.cta_desc: Preferred channels: Email and WhatsApp. We can discuss specification details before final quotation.
cta.cta_final_title: Looking for a reliable tissue supplier for long-term orders?

testimonial.testimonial_title: Check what's our clients say about us
testimonial.testimonial_text_1: Stable quality and clear communication. Our private label orders arrived on schedule.
testimonial.testimonial_text_2: Sampling and production were efficient. The team responded quickly to spec adjustments.
testimonial.testimonial_text_3: Lead time was reliable even in peak season, which helped our inventory planning.
testimonial.testimonial_text_4: A dependable supplier for tissue sourcing, with smooth documentation and shipment support.
